recovered_protocol.p0_boundary: Codex authors bounded campaign material. GPT/operator validates. Local candidate factory expands. Streaming/absorption/digest is separate later process.
recovered_protocol.p1_preflight: Before Codex: repo synced/clean, no school/codex process, active memory protected, coverage pointer/topic plan prepared, no broad full-journal context unless compacted.
recovered_protocol.p2_codex_slice_1: Codex creates coverage audit + level plan only. Purpose: choose roots, source refs, continuation levels. No generator rewrite unless explicitly needed.
recovered_protocol.p3_codex_slice_2: Codex creates/updates campaign pack and validator support under existing candidate_factory. It must not create duplicate organs or run active absorption.
recovered_protocol.p4_operator_validation: GPT/operator validates PowerShell parse, JSONL parse, seed fields, source paths, duplicate learning keys, contract consistency, and 25/100 candidate smoke.
recovered_protocol.p5_generation: Only after pack validation: local factory generates TargetAccepted candidates. Count is launch parameter. Generation is not absorption.
recovered_protocol.p6_streaming_staging: Run streaming/contract pipeline on generated candidates; prove ready_atoms/quarantine/batch reports; active_memory_mutated=false.
recovered_protocol.p7_quality_gate: Before digest/promote: inspect usefulness/repetition. Reject raw bulk if it is drill repetition; compact useful topics only.
recovered_protocol.p8_absorption_digest: Separate later process. Use memory_weight_guard before publish; no active memory mutation without backup/validator/rollback.
recovered_protocol.p9_cleanup: Cleanup raw staging only after proof/digest decision; never delete active memory or intake/growth signals blindly.

current_100k_state.status: Codex output not produced in two attempts; no campaign pack; no 100k generation; no absorption; active memory unchanged.
current_100k_state.root_cause: Tasks still allowed Codex to get lost in shell/context; next slice must be no-shell seed-plan authoring only.

next_route.after_success: GPT/operator converts validated seed-plan into campaign_pack JSONL/manifest or gives Codex a tiny slice 1B to format JSONL only.

failure_modes_from_journal: Codex broad task hangs on full context scan.
Codex shell/Powershell command generation can fail before output.
Blind level=1 for all roots was rejected; must use coverage/level plan.
Campaign pack output is CODEX_DRAFT until GPT/operator validation.
Smoke test/15k staging does not equal active memory absorption.
